/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/motor_msgs/msg/motor_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/motor_msgs/msg/encoder_data__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alereyes/C-ROS-Automodel_Car/simulacion_ws/build/motor_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
